_comment: SYNTHETIC approved-source corpus chunks for Azure AI Search (agpoc-search-dev). Consumed by search_documents tool with source_filter. doc_retrieval agent grounds the memo on these chunks only (approved sources).

documents.title: SME Credit Policy — DSCR Thresholds
documents.text: Minimum debt-service coverage ratio (DSCR) for SME term facilities is 1.25x. Facilities between 1.10x and 1.25x require enhanced collateral and a senior credit officer override. Below 1.10x is outside appetite.

documents.title: SME Credit Policy — Leverage Limits
documents.text: Net debt / EBITDA must not exceed 4.0x at origination for standard SME facilities. Renewable-energy project finance may extend to 4.5x where contracted offtake covers >80% of capacity.

documents.title: Thai Food & Beverage Sector Outlook 2026
documents.text: Thailand processed-food exports projected to grow 6-8% in 2026 on regional demand. Cold-chain capacity remains a competitive bottleneck for mid-sized processors in Samut Sakhon.

documents.title: Thailand Rooftop Solar Market 2026
documents.text: Commercial rooftop solar adoption accelerating under BOI incentives. EPC margins under pressure from module price volatility; contracted PPAs materially de-risk project cash flows.

documents.title: Thai Textile Export Cycle
documents.text: Northern Thailand textile exporters face seasonal working-capital swings; Q4 order surges typically strain liquidity. Buyers increasingly demand sustainable-sourcing certification.

documents.title: Siam Lotus Foods — Management Discussion FY2025
documents.text: Management attributes FY2025 revenue growth of 13.9% to new export contracts in Vietnam and Malaysia. Cold-storage expansion expected to lift gross margin by ~150bps once commissioned.

documents.title: Bangkok Greentech Solar — Project Pipeline Note
documents.text: Three rooftop projects (total 3MW) carry 15-year PPAs with investment-grade offtakers covering 84% of generation. Construction milestones on schedule per FY2025 review.

documents.title: Andaman Logistics — Fleet Utilisation Report
documents.text: Existing refrigerated fleet running at 91% utilisation. New 12-truck acquisition underpinned by signed cold-chain contracts with two Phuket seafood exporters.
